languages.text: {n}Каллигос в ярости мечется по Патенту, не обращая внимание на то, как бумага рвется и пачкается под его ногами.{/n} "Трусливый, подлый ксенос! Мы не закончили! Мы не закончили! Я еще заберу твой железный череп, бесчестное ты гроксово дерьмо!"

{n}Calligos rushes about the Warrant in a rage, heedless of the paper ripping and being marred beneath his feet.{/n} "That cowardly, underhanded xenos! I have not finished with you! I have not finished with you! I'll have your iron skull yet, you dishonourable groxshit!"
languages.original_text: {n}Каллигос в ярости мечется по Патенту, не обращая внимание на то, как бумага рвется и пачкается под его ногами.{/n} "Трусливый, подлый ксенос! Мы не закончили! Мы не закончили! Я еще заберу твой железный череп, бесчестное ты гроксово дерьмо!"

{n}Calligos rushes about the Warrant in a rage, heedless of the paper ripping and being marred beneath his feet.{/n} "That cowardly, underhanded xenos! I have not finished with you! I have not finished with you! I'll have your iron skull yet, you dishonourable groxshit!"

languages.text: {n}カリゴスは飛び狂ったように、証書を蹴りまくる。紙は破れ、汚れる。{/n}「卑怯な、裏切り者！まだ終わらない！まだ終わらない！お前には鉄の頭蓋骨をぶっ壊す！」
languages.original_text: {n}Calligos rushes about the Warrant in a rage, heedless of the paper ripping and being marred beneath his feet.{/n} "That cowardly, underhanded xenos! I have not finished with you! I have not finished with you! I'll have your iron skull yet, you dishonourable groxshit!"

traits.locale_text:
カッ飛び狂ったように、 WARRANT を蹴りまくる。紙は破れ、汚れる。
「卑怯な、裏切り者！まだ終わらない！まだ終わらない！お前には鉄の頭蓋骨をぶっ壊す！」

languages.text: {n}Calligos pisotea furioso la Patente, haciendo caso omiso al rasgado y las manchas que deja en el papel.{/n} «¡Maldito xenos cobarde y artero! ¡No he terminado contigo! ¡No hemos terminado! ¡Te arrancaré ese cráneo de hierro, mierda de grox sin honor!».
languages.original_text: {n}Calligos rushes about the Warrant in a rage, heedless of the paper ripping and being marred beneath his feet.{/n} "That cowardly, underhanded xenos! I have not finished with you! I have not finished with you! I'll have your iron skull yet, you dishonourable groxshit!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Calligos pisotea furioso la Patente, haciendo caso omiso al rasgado y las manchas que deja en el papel.{/n} «¡Maldito xenos cobarde y artero! ¡No he terminado contigo! ¡No hemos terminado! ¡Te arrancaré ese cráneo de hierro, mierda de grox sin honor!».

languages.text: {n}Calligos läuft wütend über den Handelsbrief und achtet nicht darauf, dass er das Papier mit seinem Füßen zerfetzt.{/n} "Dieser, feige, hinterlistige Xenos! Ich bin noch nicht mit dir fertig! Ich bin noch nicht mit dir fertig! Ich werde mir deinen eisernen Schädel holen, du ehrloses Stück Groxscheiße!"
languages.original_text: {n}Calligos rushes about the Warrant in a rage, heedless of the paper ripping and being marred beneath his feet.{/n} "That cowardly, underhanded xenos! I have not finished with you! I have not finished with you! I'll have your iron skull yet, you dishonourable groxshit!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Calligos läuft wütend über den Handelsbrief und achtet nicht darauf, dass er das Papier mit seinem Füßen zerfetzt.{/n} "Dieser, feige, hinterlistige Xenos! Ich bin noch nicht mit dir fertig! Ich bin noch nicht mit dir fertig! Ich werde mir deinen eisernen Schädel holen, du ehrloses Stück Groxscheiße!"

languages.text: {n}Calligos traverse la lettre à toute vitesse, indifférent aux déchirures et aux marques qu'il inflige au fragile papier.{/n} « Ignoble xénos ! Espèce de lâche ! Je n'en ai pas encore fini avec vous ! Je n'en ai pas encore fini avec vous ! Je vais mettre la main sur votre crâne de fer, misérable fiente de grox ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Calligos rushes about the Warrant in a rage, heedless of the paper ripping and being marred beneath his feet.{/n} "That cowardly, underhanded xenos! I have not finished with you! I have not finished with you! I'll have your iron skull yet, you dishonourable groxshit!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Calligos traverse la lettre à toute vitesse, indifférent aux déchirures et aux marques qu'il inflige au fragile papier.{/n} « Ignoble xénos ! Espèce de lâche ! Je n'en ai pas encore fini avec vous ! Je n'en ai pas encore fini avec vous ! Je vais mettre la main sur votre crâne de fer, misérable fiente de grox ! »

languages.text: {n}卡里戈斯怒不可遏地在贸易授状上奔走，毫不顾及脚下的纸张正被撕裂和污损。{/n}“胆小下作的异形！我跟你没完！没完！我迟早要拧下你的铁脑壳，你这无耻的格洛克斯兽臭大粪！”
languages.original_text: {n}Calligos rushes about the Warrant in a rage, heedless of the paper ripping and being marred beneath his feet.{/n} "That cowardly, underhanded xenos! I have not finished with you! I have not finished with you! I'll have your iron skull yet, you dishonourable groxshit!"

languages.text: {n}Calligos, ayaklarının altında yırtılan ve bozulan kâğıdı umursamadan öfkeyle Ruhsatname'nin üzerinde koşturuyor.{/n} "Korkak, sinsi zeno! Seninle işim bitmedi! Seninle işim bitmedi! Demir kafatasını alacağım onursuz groks boku!"
languages.original_text: {n}Calligos rushes about the Warrant in a rage, heedless of the paper ripping and being marred beneath his feet.{/n} "That cowardly, underhanded xenos! I have not finished with you! I have not finished with you! I'll have your iron skull yet, you dishonourable groxshit!"
